title: Stenotalis ramosissima
taxonomy: Stenotalis ramosissima is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The exact classification of Stenotalis ramosissima is within the tribe Spermacoceae. Further classification within the family may include genus and species levels.
